generateHistograms(ResultsTable) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
Generate a list containing histograms for each columns of the ResultsTable.

getWorkflowIndex() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
 
goToNextStep() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
Updates LeftPanel UI to show the next sub-panel, and manage allowing/disallowing interaction with Prev/Next footer buttons depending on the new current sub panel.
goToPrevStep() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
Updates LeftPanel UI to show the previous sub-panel, and manage allowing/disallowing interaction with Prev/Next footer buttons depending on the new current sub panel.
goToStep(int) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
Updates LeftPanel UI to show the given sub-panel, and manage allowing/disallowing interaction with Prev/Next footer buttons depending on the new current sub panel.
